title: Apple Gross Margin Savings from In-House Chips
title_translation: 自研芯片带来的毛利节省

pro.text: 踢出英特尔，入账超 40 亿美元

issues.description: 中英文之间缺少必要的空格，违反了中文排版规范（CJK-Latin spacing）。此问题在全文多次出现，例如第 7、15、17 段的“M系列”、“A系列”、“C系列”、“N系列”，以及第 10 段的“C1基带”。
译文“毛利率层面的成本节约”表达略显生硬，且“毛利率”（比例）与“成本节约”（绝对值）的搭配略显勉强。

paragraphs.source: The decision to abandon Intel for the Mac was the single most profitable supply chain decision in Apple’s history.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The decision to abandon Intel for the Mac was the single most profitable supply chain decision in Apple’s history.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The decision to abandon Intel for the Mac was the single most profitable supply chain decision in Apple’s history.

pro.text: Mac 产品线弃用英特尔，是苹果史上利润最丰厚的一项供应链决策。

paragraphs.source: Prior to 2020, Apple paid Intel approximately $250 for a possibly overheating laptop CPU. Today, the M-series chip costs Apple estimated $40-50 to manufacture.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Prior to 2020, Apple paid Intel approximately $250 for a possibly overheating laptop CPU. Today, the M-series chip costs Apple estimated $40-50 to manufacture.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Prior to 2020, Apple paid Intel approximately $250 for a possibly overheating laptop CPU. Today, the M-series chip costs Apple estimated $40-50 to manufacture.

pro.text: 2020 年之前，苹果为采购一颗存在过热隐患的笔记本 CPU，需向英特尔支付约 250 美元。如今，苹果制造一颗 M系列芯片的成本预估仅为 40 至 50 美元。

issues.description: 中英文之间缺少必要的空格，违反了中文排版规范（CJK-Latin spacing）。此问题在全文多次出现，例如第 7、15、17 段的“M系列”、“A系列”、“C系列”、“N系列”，以及第 10 段的“C1基带”。
译文“毛利率层面的成本节约”表达略显生硬，且“毛利率”（比例）与“成本节约”（绝对值）的搭配略显勉强。

paragraphs.source: The Mac gross margin story is the clearest proof of Apple’s silicon thesis. In 2019, Mac GM sat at 28.5%, constrained by Intel’s $150+ processor ASPs and a roadmap that delivered clock speed regression instead of progress. By 2025, Mac GM stands at 39.5%. That 11 percentage point expansion on a $40B Mac business translates to roughly $4.4 billion in incremental annual gross profit.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The Mac gross margin story is the clearest proof of Apple’s silicon thesis. In 2019, Mac GM sat at 28.5%, constrained by Intel’s $150+ processor ASPs and a roadmap that delivered clock speed regression instead of progress. By 2025, Mac GM stands at 39.5%. That 11 percentage point expansion on a $40B Mac business translates to roughly $4.4 billion in incremental annual gross profit.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The Mac gross margin story is the clearest proof of Apple’s silicon thesis. In 2019, Mac GM sat at 28.5%, constrained by Intel’s $150+ processor ASPs and a roadmap that delivered clock speed regression instead of progress. By 2025, Mac GM stands at 39.5%. That 11 percentage point expansion on a $40B Mac business translates to roughly $4.4 billion in incremental annual gross profit.

pro.text: Mac 产品线的毛利率表现，是苹果自研芯片战略最强有力的佐证。2019 年，受制于英特尔高达 150 美元以上的处理器平均售价 (ASP)，外加其产品路线图上的时钟频率不进反退，Mac 毛利率仅徘徊在 28.5%。到 2025 年，Mac 毛利率已攀升至 39.5%。在规模达 400 亿美元的 Mac 业务中，这 11 个百分点的增幅，意味着每年约 44 亿美元的新增毛利润。

译文“毛利率层面的成本节约”表达略显生硬，且“毛利率”（比例）与“成本节约”（绝对值）的搭配略显勉强。

paragraphs.source: Intel’s failure to ship 10nm at competitive yields for over five years represented a multi-billion dollar transfer of value from Cupertino to Santa Clara. Apple finally recaptured it. The M-series chips cost Apple an estimated $77 per unit in COGS (N3 wafers, packaging, yield loss) versus Intel’s $150+ Core i9 ASP. At 65 million Mac units annually, the transition generates $4.77 billion in gross profit lift. Break-even is 14 million units against a $1 billion NRE investment.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Intel’s failure to ship 10nm at competitive yields for over five years represented a multi-billion dollar transfer of value from Cupertino to Santa Clara. Apple finally recaptured it. The M-series chips cost Apple an estimated $77 per unit in COGS (N3 wafers, packaging, yield loss) versus Intel’s $150+ Core i9 ASP. At 65 million Mac units annually, the transition generates $4.77 billion in gross profit lift. Break-even is 14 million units against a $1 billion NRE investment.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Intel’s failure to ship 10nm at competitive yields for over five years represented a multi-billion dollar transfer of value from Cupertino to Santa Clara. Apple finally recaptured it. The M-series chips cost Apple an estimated $77 per unit in COGS (N3 wafers, packaging, yield loss) versus Intel’s $150+ Core i9 ASP. At 65 million Mac units annually, the transition generates $4.77 billion in gross profit lift. Break-even is 14 million units against a $1 billion NRE investment.

pro.text: 英特尔长达五年多未能以具备竞争力的良率量产 10 纳米工艺，导致数十亿美元的价值从苹果流向了英特尔。如今，苹果终于夺回了这笔利润。M系列芯片的单颗销货成本 (COGS)（涵盖 N3 晶圆、封装及良率损耗）预估为 77 美元，相比之下，英特尔 Core i9 的平均售价 (ASP) 则高达 150 美元以上。按每年 6500 万台 Mac 的销量计算，此次架构转换可带来 47.7 亿美元的毛利润提升。面对 10 亿美元的一次性工程费用 (NRE) 投入，其盈亏平衡点仅为 1400 万颗。

paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The Modem Bet: $6B to Break Qualcomm’s Stranglehold

pro.text: 基带豪赌：砸下 60 亿美元打破高通垄断

paragraphs.source: The ongoing transition away from Qualcomm (estimated $1.2B/year savings) represents the final major piece of the puzzle.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The ongoing transition away from Qualcomm (estimated $1.2B/year savings) represents the final major piece of the puzzle.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The ongoing transition away from Qualcomm (estimated $1.2B/year savings) represents the final major piece of the puzzle.

pro.text: 逐步摆脱对高通的依赖（预计每年节省 12 亿美元），是苹果自研芯片版图的最后一块关键拼图。

译文“毛利率层面的成本节约”表达略显生硬，且“毛利率”（比例）与“成本节约”（绝对值）的搭配略显勉强。

paragraphs.source: The C1 modem represents Apple’s most expensive and most contentious insourcing bet. Qualcomm’s X75 5G chip commands a $20+ ASP with gross margins of 50%. Apple’s C1 alternative, built on N4 with a 50mm² die, costs an estimated $14.40 in COGS. The $5 per-unit savings across 250 million cellular iOS devices yields $1.2B in annual gross profit improvement.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The C1 modem represents Apple’s most expensive and most contentious insourcing bet. Qualcomm’s X75 5G chip commands a $20+ ASP with gross margins of 50%. Apple’s C1 alternative, built on N4 with a 50mm² die, costs an estimated $14.40 in COGS. The $5 per-unit savings across 250 million cellular iOS devices yields $1.2B in annual gross profit improvement.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The C1 modem represents Apple’s most expensive and most contentious insourcing bet. Qualcomm’s X75 5G chip commands a $20+ ASP with gross margins of 50%. Apple’s C1 alternative, built on N4 with a 50mm² die, costs an estimated $14.40 in COGS. The $5 per-unit savings across 250 million cellular iOS devices yields $1.2B in annual gross profit improvement.

pro.text: C1基带是苹果代价最高、也最具争议的一场自研豪赌。高通的 X75 5G 芯片平均售价 (ASP) 超过 20 美元，毛利率高达 50%。相比之下，苹果自研的 C1基带采用 N4 工艺，裸片面积为 50 平方毫米，单颗销货成本 (COGS) 估计为 14.40 美元。在 2.5 亿台支持蜂窝网络的 iOS 设备中，单机节省的 5 美元每年可带来 12 亿美元的毛利提升。

issues.description: 中英文之间缺少必要的空格，违反了中文排版规范（CJK-Latin spacing）。此问题在全文多次出现，例如第 7、15、17 段的“M系列”、“A系列”、“C系列”、“N系列”，以及第 10 段的“C1基带”。
译文“毛利率层面的成本节约”表达略显生硬，且“毛利率”（比例）与“成本节约”（绝对值）的搭配略显勉强。

paragraphs.source: The real story is the NRE. Apple spent $6B (including the $1B Intel modem acquisition, 2,200 engineers, mask sets, and qualification costs) to get here. Break-even volume is 1.3B units, roughly 5 years of iPhone production. By 2027, when Qualcomm is fully phased out, the recurring savings become pure margin expansion.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The real story is the NRE. Apple spent $6B (including the $1B Intel modem acquisition, 2,200 engineers, mask sets, and qualification costs) to get here. Break-even volume is 1.3B units, roughly 5 years of iPhone production. By 2027, when Qualcomm is fully phased out, the recurring savings become pure margin expansion.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The real story is the NRE. Apple spent $6B (including the $1B Intel modem acquisition, 2,200 engineers, mask sets, and qualification costs) to get here. Break-even volume is 1.3B units, roughly 5 years of iPhone production. By 2027, when Qualcomm is fully phased out, the recurring savings become pure margin expansion.

pro.text: 真正的重头戏在于一次性工程费用 (NRE)。为了达成这一目标，苹果砸下了 60 亿美元（包括斥资 10 亿美元收购英特尔基带业务、组建 2200 人的工程师团队，以及光罩套件和认证成本）。该项目的盈亏平衡销量高达 13 亿颗，大约相当于 iPhone 五年的总产量。到 2027 年高通芯片被彻底淘汰时，这些持续节省下来的成本将转化为纯粹的利润率扩张。

pro.text: 自研 Wi-Fi 7：从博通手中夺回 7 亿美元

paragraphs.source: Apple’s move against Broadcom in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth receives less attention but carries equal significance. The N1 chip, Apple’s first in-house Wi-Fi 7 solution, replaces Broadcom’s $11 combo chip with an internally designed alternative costing $8.7 in COGS. At $2.3 savings per unit across 300 million iOS devices, that’s $700M in annual gross profit recapture. The NRE was relatively modest at $250M, yielding break-even at 110 million units. Breakeven likely within the first year of production.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Apple’s move against Broadcom in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth receives less attention but carries equal significance. The N1 chip, Apple’s first in-house Wi-Fi 7 solution, replaces Broadcom’s $11 combo chip with an internally designed alternative costing $8.7 in COGS. At $2.3 savings per unit across 300 million iOS devices, that’s $700M in annual gross profit recapture. The NRE was relatively modest at $250M, yielding break-even at 110 million units. Breakeven likely within the first year of production.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Apple’s move against Broadcom in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth receives less attention but carries equal significance. The N1 chip, Apple’s first in-house Wi-Fi 7 solution, replaces Broadcom’s $11 combo chip with an internally designed alternative costing $8.7 in COGS. At $2.3 savings per unit across 300 million iOS devices, that’s $700M in annual gross profit recapture. The NRE was relatively modest at $250M, yielding break-even at 110 million units. Breakeven likely within the first year of production.

pro.text: 苹果在 Wi-Fi 和蓝牙领域向博通发起的攻势鲜受关注，但意义同样重大。N1 是苹果首款自研 Wi-Fi 7 解决方案，它取代了博通售价 11 美元的组合芯片，其单颗 COGS 降至 8.7 美元。在 3 亿台 iOS 设备中，单机节省 2.3 美元，每年可夺回 7 亿美元的毛利。该项目的 NRE 相对较低，仅为 2.5 亿美元，盈亏平衡销量为 1.1 亿颗。预计在量产的首年内即可实现盈亏平衡。

pro.text: 毛利率层面的成本节约

issues.description: 中英文之间缺少必要的空格，违反了中文排版规范（CJK-Latin spacing）。此问题在全文多次出现，例如第 7、15、17 段的“M系列”、“A系列”、“C系列”、“N系列”，以及第 10 段的“C1基带”。

paragraphs.source: These savings recur and compound annually. Each A-series generation inherits prior design wins. Each M-series chip amortizes NRE across Mac, iPad, and now Vision Pro. The $7.5B in combined annual savings (Intel CPU: $5B, Qualcomm Modem: $1.2B, Broadcom Connectivity: $700M, GPU/NPU IP: $0.5B, plus efficiency gains) funds the next round of R&D. Apple plows savings back into R&D. Android OEMs still pay Qualcomm and MediaTek for chips Apple now makes itself.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: These savings recur and compound annually. Each A-series generation inherits prior design wins. Each M-series chip amortizes NRE across Mac, iPad, and now Vision Pro. The $7.5B in combined annual savings (Intel CPU: $5B, Qualcomm Modem: $1.2B, Broadcom Connectivity: $700M, GPU/NPU IP: $0.5B, plus efficiency gains) funds the next round of R&D. Apple plows savings back into R&D. Android OEMs still pay Qualcomm and MediaTek for chips Apple now makes itself.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: These savings recur and compound annually. Each A-series generation inherits prior design wins. Each M-series chip amortizes NRE across Mac, iPad, and now Vision Pro. The $7.5B in combined annual savings (Intel CPU: $5B, Qualcomm Modem: $1.2B, Broadcom Connectivity: $700M, GPU/NPU IP: $0.5B, plus efficiency gains) funds the next round of R&D. Apple plows savings back into R&D. Android OEMs still pay Qualcomm and MediaTek for chips Apple now makes itself.

pro.text: 这些节约下来的成本每年都会循环产生并带来复利效应。每一代 A系列芯片都能继承前代的设计成果。每一款 M系列芯片都能在 Mac、iPad 以及如今的 Vision Pro 产品线中摊销 NRE。每年合计高达 75 亿美元的成本节约（英特尔 CPU：50 亿美元；高通基带：12 亿美元；博通连接芯片：7 亿美元；GPU/NPU IP：5 亿美元，外加效率提升带来的收益）为下一轮研发提供了资金弹药。苹果将节约的资金反哺研发，而安卓手机厂商却仍在向高通和联发科购买苹果如今已能自研的芯片。

paragraphs.source: The Total Product Gross Margin trajectory tells the story: 34.4% in 2018 to 36.8% in 2025, with Mac leading the charge and iPhone following as custom silicon matures.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The Total Product Gross Margin trajectory tells the story: 34.4% in 2018 to 36.8% in 2025, with Mac leading the charge and iPhone following as custom silicon matures.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The Total Product Gross Margin trajectory tells the story: 34.4% in 2018 to 36.8% in 2025, with Mac leading the charge and iPhone following as custom silicon matures.

pro.text: 总产品毛利率的走势便是最好的佐证：从 2018 年的 34.4% 攀升至 2025 年的 36.8%。随着定制芯片日益成熟，Mac 率先发力，iPhone 紧随其后。

paragraphs.source: More Apple in-house chips mean more business for TSMC. M-series boosted TSMC’s Apple revenue by $5B. The C-series and N-series wafers will incrementally add up to $3B.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: More Apple in-house chips mean more business for TSMC. M-series boosted TSMC’s Apple revenue by $5B. The C-series and N-series wafers will incrementally add up to $3B.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: More Apple in-house chips mean more business for TSMC. M-series boosted TSMC’s Apple revenue by $5B. The C-series and N-series wafers will incrementally add up to $3B.

pro.text: 苹果自研芯片不断扩容，直接转化为台积电的业务增量。M系列拉动台积电的苹果业务营收增长了 50 亿美元。C系列与 N系列晶圆还将逐步带来 30 亿美元的增量。

issues.description: 中英文之间缺少必要的空格，违反了中文排版规范（CJK-Latin spacing）。此问题在全文多次出现，例如第 7、15、17 段的“M系列”、“A系列”、“C系列”、“N系列”，以及第 10 段的“C1基带”。
译文“毛利率层面的成本节约”表达略显生硬，且“毛利率”（比例）与“成本节约”（绝对值）的搭配略显勉强。
